danger_signals.meaning: Major conflict point; escalated threat level

Progress toward extra life; resource accumulation indicator

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Standard soldiers vs. elite variants (Axel Gear as 'Black Knight' corrupted variant)
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Devotindos desert territory; Devotindos castle; pig-constructed structures; Pig Star starship

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Black Knight armor variant; former Rocket Knight corrupted form
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Distinct from standard Devotindos soldiers; unique boss-level sprite
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Airship escape vessel; kidnapper presence in castle

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Devotindos soldiers occupying Zephyrus castle and surrounding terrain; altered castle interior aesthetics
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Enemy patrols and ambushes throughout levels; escalating enemy density as player progresses toward castle

world_state_to_visual.world_state: Seal key secured in royal family
world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Princess Sherry present in castle (kidnapped state); key location unknown visually
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Axel Gear active as kidnapper; final boss Devilgus Devotindos pursues key

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Final stage environment shifts to starship interior aesthetic; cosmic/space environment
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Final boss encounters; Core entity as true antagonist control source; alternate stage gameplay (space flight segment)

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Arid biome visuals; Devotindos Empire presence in desert region
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Enemy encounters in desert; transition zone between Zephyrus and Devotindos kingdoms

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Enemy sprite intensity; visual density of hazards increases
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Enemy attack patterns become more aggressive; enemy projectile frequency increases; reduced player vitality allowance on higher difficulties

environmental_storytelling.example: Journey from Zephyrus castle → desert → Devotindos castle → Pig Star space vessel traces invasion route and territorial conquest; visual environment shift communicates political boundary crossing
Zephyrus royal castle has distinct architectural aesthetic vs. Devotindos pig-empire fortress; visual contrast establishes faction territorial identity
Devotindos soldiers stationed throughout early levels communicate invasion occupation; enemy patrol patterns suggest military control
Lava in Devotindos territory, spikes in mechanical/industrial areas; environmental hazard type signals which faction controls the space
Axel Gear distinguished as 'Black Knight' corrupted form vs. standard Rocket Knight aesthetic; visual design communicates internal betrayal/corruption subplot
Pig Star interior has distinct sci-fi military aesthetic vs. medieval kingdom architecture; visual shift communicates Devotindos Empire as technologically superior threat

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Sword attacks with short-range energy projectiles; sword-centric combat stance

entity_behavioral_tells.visual_tell: Blue bar fills on screen top; visual charge indicator
entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Burst attack in 8 directional outputs or stationary spin; wall-rebound capability for vertical traversal
Standard movement patterns; projectile fire at player proximity
Increased projectile frequency and pattern complexity on higher difficulty settings
Kidnapper evasion; initiates chase sequence; establishes as mobile threat
Melee duel; distinct attack pattern vs. standard enemies
Melee combat; higher durability; reveals robotic nature on defeat
Controlling force; escape pod pursuit; atmospheric re-entry sequence; ultimate threat manifestation

notes: Rocket Knight Adventures uses biological/mechanical faction contrast as primary world-state communicator. Zephyrus kingdom = medieval knight aesthetic; Devotindos = pig-humanoid industrial-military empire. Difficulty settings alter enemy behavior and damage output, creating layered threat communication through behavior rather than visual redesign. Stage hazard types (spikes, lava, instant-death terrain) serve dual purpose: environmental storytelling (faction control signature) and mechanical danger signaling. Boss progression reveals narrative escalation: soldier → Axel Gear (defector) → Emperor → Core (true AI threat), with each escalation accompanied by visual/mechanical complexity increase. Starship environment represents technological threat superiority.
